What experience do you have right now when it comes to building a business online and entrepreneurship?
I have 0 experience to be honest but in the position that i am in right now, I am willing to learn and set my mind to it

Have you had your "Line In The Sand Moment"? If so, tell us about it in detail below.
My "Line In The Sand Moment" happened when I started to realize I am doing the same thing everyday, also doing something I don't enjoy doing. Also i realized i needed to lock in and find some other way to make more income to be able to provide for my misses and our newborn baby boy. I want to be able to just provide and give them the life they deserve.
